sessionStart.bash: mkdir -p ~/.logs && jq -r '"\(now | strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")) | Session: \(.sessionId) | Transcript: \(.transcriptPath) | Source: \(.source)"' >> ~/.logs/sessions.log
sessionStart.powershell: if (!(Test-Path ~/.logs)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path ~/.logs }; $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; "$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') | Session: $($data.sessionId) | Transcript: $($data.transcriptPath) | Source: $($data.source)" | Add-Content -Path ~/.logs/sessions.log

preToolUse.bash: mkdir -p ~/.logs && jq -r '"\(now | strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")) | Tool: \(.tool) | Session: \(.sessionId) | Input: \(.input | tostring)"' >> ~/.logs/tool-executions.log
preToolUse.powershell: if (!(Test-Path ~/.logs)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path ~/.logs }; $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; "$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') | Tool: $($data.tool) | Session: $($data.sessionId) | Input: $($data.input | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)" | Add-Content -Path ~/.logs/tool-executions.log
